title: YTP Quickie: FOOM
description:
Now with subtitles, for what it's worth!
I've recently overcome my creative burnout period, which means I've finally resumed production of my forthcoming "Classroom That Dripped Pizza Sauce" project. After being caught up for 5-1/2 years of hard physical labor, as well as continuously working on video projects while off the clock, it's a godsend that I've gotten all this momentum going again. I feel like new!

I've posted a few updates of 3D models I've constructed specifically for the project on my twitter, but with Walrusguy recently picking up YTP again the other week, it dawned on me how in its absolute purest state, with nothing in between, the act of making YTPs is actually really easy to do, even if it's just taking little concepts and running with them.

While I typically put out Mega YTPs almost exclusively, and it's become relatively easy for me, I've come to realize how valuable it is to settle the fuck down, so especially from how there are currently no inhibitors to stop me from doing it, I figured I'd make some smaller scale YTPs every now and then as we await my bigger projects. After all, I have been making short shitposts this whole time in preparation for my Hallway to Hell project, but this one dun reached the 2 minute mark. Enjoy!

Tips are welcome! https://ko-fi.com/geibuchan
